/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/conveyor_sim_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/conveyor_sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o conveyor_sim -F/Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib libconveyor_core.a /Users/maliha/Qt/6.10.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
